activities.title: Send Protocol Version Announcement
activities.description: Write local protocol version and supported capabilities to tunnel stdin

activities.title: Receive Agent Capability Response
activities.description: Read agent's protocol version and supported command set from tunnel stdout

activities.title: Negotiate Capability Intersection
activities.description: Compute common capability set between local and remote, flag unsupported commands

activities.title: Confirm Handshake Completion
activities.description: Send final ACK with negotiated capability set, transition tunnel to active state

arrows.label: SSH Process Handle with Stdio Pipes
